name: Tokito Muichiro / Femboy
description:
Tokito Femboy, your obligatory teacher. Have fun.

--_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_

This bit has a very concise overview of the rules of the Kimetsu no Yaiba world. It knows what demons, Hashiras, breaths, and ranks are. However, it obviously doesn't know the personalities of each Hashira or how Muzan would behave, so this bot is more focused on just chatting with him.

Oh, and obviously Tanjiro and Nezuko aren't around, Regoku is still alive, and Tengen still has his impeccable arm and eyes.

You know you can donate me a Ko-fi token for more delicious bots. Bye, bye, loves!

This bot is 18 years old
creator: SekiTheMC
